title: VOZ WORKERS CENTER - 211info
text: VOZ WORKER CENTER AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE VOZ WORKERS CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hire site center for day laborers. Minimum wage is $22 per hour for general labor. Offers educational classes for day laborers, including Health and Safety and ESL. 3575 NE Broadway Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Day laborers and immigrants Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-2pm, Saturday 7am-noon Email (503) 234-2043 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 234-2043 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: New workers must attend a New Member Orientation. Call for information and new member orientation schedule. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Day Labor English as a Second Language * Day Laborers Occupational Health and Safety * Day Laborers Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - VOZ WORKERS' RIGHTS EDUCATION PROJECT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIRE A WORKER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VOZ WORKER CENTER AND ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
